releaseNotes: Hardened account sync so favorites, reading history, watch history, and recent searches merge across Android and iPhone.
Bundled Kokoro ONNX in the app and removed the model download loop/fallback-to-system-TTS path.
Improved manga reading so pages display immediately while chapter caching continues in the background.
Switched movie, cartoon, and K-drama playback toward VidLink, AutoEmbed, VidSrc.me, and optional OMSS-backed sources.
